subjects.description: An oncoming vehicle in the opposite lane, identifiable mainly by its intensely bright high-beam headlights piercing through the darkness; the body of the car is obscured behind the glare, only faint hints of a dark sedan silhouette visible around the light source
subjects.appearance_details: Two blinding white-blue headlight pools smeared into halos by dust haze, with diffused lens-flare artifacts, halation, and bloom; faint amber side marker glow
subjects.relationship: The source of glare impairing the ego vehicle's visibility; travels directly opposite the ego on the shared desert-edge arterial
subjects.location: center to slightly left of frame, approaching from background to midground
subjects.relative_size: Small within frame growing to Medium within frame as it nears
subjects.orientation: Front-facing toward the camera, headlights aimed directly at the ego viewpoint
subjects.action: Approaching on the opposite lane with high beams on, then passing by
subjects.state_changes: Grows brighter and larger as it nears the low rise through the haze, peaks in glare at closest approach, then sweeps past to the left and recedes, glare clearing amid the dust

subjects.description: The ego vehicle itself, represented only by its interior dashboard edge and the forward illumination of its own headlights spilling onto the road ahead
subjects.appearance_details: Faint dashboard reflection along the bottom edge of the frame, twin cones of headlight light spreading over the asphalt and lane markings
subjects.relationship: The point-of-view vehicle through which the entire scene is observed
subjects.location: implied at camera position, dashboard at bottom foreground
subjects.orientation: Facing forward down the road in the driving direction
subjects.action: Driving the desert-edge arterial, lifting over a low sand-drifted rise, then continuing while slowing and resuming speed
subjects.state_changes: Decelerates significantly during peak glare, then accelerates back to nominal cruising speed

background_setting: A Middle-Eastern desert-edge arterial road on a hazy dry-season night, a flat two-lane road of dry sandy asphalt with a faint dusting of blown sand across the lanes, no central divider. Low concrete-block buildings and a few palm silhouettes line one side; sparse warm sodium lamps glow through fine airborne dust. Faded markings show under the headlights. The road runs level then lifts over a low sand-drifted rise ahead, a crest that briefly hides then reveals the oncoming lane through the haze. Beyond the lamps the desert edge fades into dusty dark.

lighting.conditions: Hazy dry-season desert night with sparse warm sodium lamps and airborne dust; dry sandy roadway
lighting.direction: Ego headlights front-lit; intense oncoming high-beam glare ahead and slightly left through the dust haze
lighting.shadows: Faint diffuse shadows from sodium lamps softened by dust on sandy asphalt
lighting.illumination_effect: Warm sodium haze over sand-dusted asphalt; oncoming high beams produce overwhelming dust-amplified bloom, diffused starburst flares, and washout

aesthetics.composition: Sandy arterial to a low rise near mid-frame with palm silhouettes, oncoming glare blooming through haze upper-center, dashboard edge at bottom
aesthetics.color_scheme: Warm sodium-amber dust haze and sandy grey asphalt over dark blocky buildings, cut by harsh white-blue headlight glare
aesthetics.mood_atmosphere: Tense, warm, disorienting, momentarily blinding, cautious in the haze
aesthetics.patterns: Blown sand streaks, palm silhouettes, and faded markings sliding past

cinematography.camera_motion: Forward dashcam tracking along the desert-edge arterial, subtle bob over the low rise, deceleration drift then re-acceleration
cinematography.framing: Wide shot of the road ahead from driver viewpoint
cinematography.focus: Road and faded markings ahead, though glare and dust haze overwhelm focus at peak brightness

context: Demonstration of nighttime oncoming-headlight glare and driver visibility management on a desert-edge arterial road

actions.description: Ego vehicle drives the desert-edge arterial at nominal speed, distant oncoming headlights appear faint through haze past a low rise
Vehicle lifts over the low rise; oncoming high beams rapidly intensify, flooding the hazy view with glare and lens artifacts
Ego vehicle slows significantly to manage impaired visibility as the oncoming car passes on the left
Glare clears, arterial becomes visible again, ego vehicle resumes nominal speed

segments.description: Driving the desert-edge arterial at steady speed with faint oncoming light growing through haze past a low rise
segments.key_changes: Distant headlights begin to appear amid sodium haze
segments.camera: Forward tracking with slight upward pitch on the climb

segments.description: Lifting over the low rise as oncoming high beams flare into severe dust-amplified glare
segments.key_changes: Rapid increase in brightness, bloom and diffused starburst artifacts wash across the frame
segments.camera: Subtle bob over the crest, then leveling into descent

segments.description: Ego vehicle slows for the passing car, then glare clears and nominal speed resumes
segments.key_changes: Deceleration, oncoming vehicle sweeps past left, artifacts fade, arterial regains visibility, re-acceleration
segments.camera: Slight forward dip during braking, then smooth resumed forward tracking

temporal_caption: At 0:00 the dashcam view shows a hazy desert-edge arterial at night, ego headlights over sand-dusted asphalt and warm sodium lamps while a faint glow appears through haze past a low rise. By 0:01 the vehicle lifts over the rise and a pair of oncoming high beams rapidly brightens. Through 0:02-0:03 the view is overwhelmed by dust-amplified white-blue glare, diffused lens flares, and bloom. Around 0:03 the ego slows noticeably to cope with impaired visibility as the oncoming car sweeps past on the left. From 0:04 to 0:05 the glare clears, the arterial reappears, and the ego accelerates back to nominal cruising speed.
audio_description: Steady low hum of the engine and tire noise on sandy asphalt, rising then dipping as the vehicle decelerates. Warm dry-night wind carrying grit, a faint whoosh of the oncoming vehicle passing, distant town quiet; no music or speech.
